this_is_your_private_space_reclaim_your_: This is your private space. Reclaim your voice by writing exactly what you need to say to your OCD.
speak_your_truth_ocd_has_had_its_turn__n: Speak your truth. OCD has had its turn — now it's yours.
writing_your_truth_is_an_act_of_defiance: Writing your truth is an act of defiance. You've reclaimed your voice today.
prompt_text:
Dear OCD,

You've taken up too much of my time. You've made me question everything. But today I'm writing back.

I want you to know that…
